scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,mobile -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix mobile-app run start"
scripts.ios: concurrently -n backend,ios -c green,blue "npm --prefix backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix mobile-app run ios"
scripts.android: concurrently -n backend,android -c green,magenta "npm --prefix backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix mobile-app run android"
scripts.web: concurrently -n backend,web -c green,yellow "npm --prefix backend-api run dev" "npm --prefix mobile-app run web"
